ksa_text: Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data flows, access patterns, and retention practices against privacy requirements and privacy-by-design principles.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Security & Privacy (domain affinity 0.30); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4138). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
